# Workset

> Workset is a Go CLI and desktop app for managing multi-repo threads with linked Git worktrees.

Start with the overview and Getting Started, then use the Guides and Reference sections for detailed documentation.

## Start here

- [Home](https://workset.dev/)
- [Getting Started](https://workset.dev/getting-started/)
- [Installation](https://workset.dev/getting-started/installation/)
- [Quickstart](https://workset.dev/getting-started/quickstart/)

## Guides

- [Multi-Repo Workflows](https://workset.dev/guides/multi-repo-workflows/)
- [Worksets](https://workset.dev/guides/worksets/)
- [GitHub Integration](https://workset.dev/guides/github-integration/)
- [AI Agents](https://workset.dev/guides/ai-agents/)
- [Hooks](https://workset.dev/guides/hooks/)
- [Desktop App](https://workset.dev/guides/desktop-app/)

## Reference

- [CLI Reference](https://workset.dev/reference/cli/)
- [Config Reference](https://workset.dev/reference/config/)
- [Concepts](https://workset.dev/reference/concepts/)
- [Environment Variables](https://workset.dev/reference/env-vars/)

## Other

- [Troubleshooting](https://workset.dev/troubleshooting/)
- [Contributing](https://workset.dev/contributing/)
- [Changelog](https://workset.dev/changelog/)

## Source

- [GitHub repository](https://github.com/strantalis/workset): source code and issues
